tool.name: Unzip collection
tool.help:
======== Synopsis ========
Splits a paired dataset into two individual datasets (forward and reverse).
=========== Description ===========
This tool takes a single ``paired`` collection and extracts its two components — the **forward** and the **reverse** dataset — as separate output datasets.
This is the inverse of **Zip collections**, which combines two datasets into a pair.
======== Examples ========
**Unzip a paired collection**
Input ``paired`` collection::
Paired: "Sample 1"
forward → reads_R1.fastq reverse → reads_R2.fastq
Outputs::
Forward dataset: reads_R1.fastq Reverse dataset: reads_R2.fastq
-------
.. image:: ${static_path}/images/tools/collection_ops/unzip.svg :alt: Unzip a paired collection into forward and reverse datasets :width: 500
-------
.. class:: infomark
@QUOTA_USAGE_NOTE@
